title: Infosys Receives INR 8,27,50,000 Penalty Communication from Joint Commissioner of CGST
detailed_summary: Infosys received communication from the Joint Commissioner of CGST for collection of a total penalty of INR 8,27,50,000. The matter relates to alleged disallowance of Blocked ITC, Excess ITC, Wrong head, and invoices not in 2A for FY 2018- 19 to FY 2022-23. Infosys stated that there is no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities.

key_facts.fact: Infosys received communication for collection of a total penalty of INR 8,27,50,000 from the Joint Commissioner of CGST.
The communication was received on December 16, 2025 18:27 IST.
The alleged violations relate to disallowance of Blocked ITC, Excess ITC, Wrong head, and invoices not in 2A for FY 2018- 19 to FY 2022-23.
Infosys stated that there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.

litigation_or_regulatory_matters.description: Orders passed/action taken for alleged disallowance of Blocked ITC, Excess ITC, Wrong head, and invoices not in 2A for FY 2018- 19 to FY 2022-23.

important_text_spans.reason: Supports the amount of the regulatory penalty.

important_text_spans.text: None, there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the company's stated impact assessment.
